name: Feature Request Inbox
description: A static AgentSite feature-request inbox for autonomous improvement loops.
brief: Create a static GitHub Pages site that demonstrates a feature-request inbox: a public-safe queue of requested improvements with status, priority, acceptance criteria, recipe candidates, verification plans, and next actions. It must not include private tickets, raw chats, auth, analytics, or live sync.
heroHeadline: A static inbox for the next AgentSite improvement
heroLede: The page turns requested improvements into curated, QA-ready records with priority, acceptance criteria, recipe candidates, verification plans, and next actions.
visualDirection: dark cockpit request queue with status and priority filters

sections.title: Requests become verifiable work items
sections.body: Each request carries enough context for an agent to plan, implement, check, deploy, and record the run.

sections.title: Acceptance criteria come first
sections.body: The inbox requires clear acceptance criteria and verification steps before work is considered ready.

sections.title: No private inbox or live sync
sections.body: The queue is public static JSON, not an authenticated ticketing system, private support inbox, or live task sync.

proofArtifacts.label: Request data
proofArtifacts.body: src/data/requests.json contains public-safe request records validated by npm run check:requests.

proofArtifacts.label: Request UI
proofArtifacts.body: src/components/FeatureRequestInbox.astro filters requests by text, status, and priority.

proofArtifacts.label: Request QA
proofArtifacts.body: Visual QA exercises request inbox search and filters when the inbox is present.

allowedClaims: Repo-local QA scripts validate request records
approvalRequired: Adding analytics, cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party forms
Adding payment links or enabling payment mode
Indexing private tickets, raw chats, credentials, secrets, or unpublished user data
Adding live task sync, server runtime, authentication, or a database
